name: ai-builder
description: Plan, develop, and test Everworker AI Builder artifacts — workflows, Universal Workers, code nodes, memories, and collections — from Claude Code.

everworker_url.title: Everworker base URL
everworker_url.description: Base URL of the Everworker instance the plugin should target (no trailing slash). Example: https://app.everworker.ai or http://localhost:3000.

everworker_jwt.title: Everworker JWT token
everworker_jwt.description: Personal JWT issued by an Everworker admin. Must include the workflow-builder scope. Stored in the OS keychain.
